interactions.inputs: {"companyName":"Meridian Dynamics","industry":"Technology Consulting","subsector":"Digital Transformation","transcript":"Meeting with Meridian Dynamics VP of Sales and CTO.","runId":"mock-run-touch4"}
interactions.stageContent: {"briefData":{"executiveSummary":"Meridian Dynamics faces a critical bottleneck in their sales proposal process, with turnaround times averaging 5-7 business days. This delay directly impacts win rates and limits the team's capacity to pursue new opportunities. AtlusDeck's AI-powered proposal automation platform addresses this gap by reducing proposal generation to under 2 hours while maintaining brand consistency and personalization quality.","solutionPillars":[{"name":"Intelligent Proposal Generation","description":"AI-driven content assembly that pulls from approved templates and personalizes based on prospect industry, pain points, and engagement history. Generates complete proposal decks with talk tracks and FAQ documents."},{"name":"Human-in-the-Loop Quality Assurance","description":"Multi-stage review workflow with skeleton, draft, and final checkpoints. Sellers maintain full control over content quality while AI handles the heavy lifting of initial creation and formatting."},{"name":"Google Workspace Integration","description":"Native integration with Google Slides, Docs, and Drive. Generated assets are automatically saved to the deal folder with proper access controls and version management."}]},"roiFramingData":{"outcomes":[{"outcome":"Reduce proposal turnaround from 5-7 days to under 2 hours"},{"outcome":"Increase win rate by 15% through data-driven personalization"},{"outcome":"Scale proposal capacity 4x without additional headcount"},{"outcome":"Achieve full ROI within 90 days of deployment"}]},"proposalOutline":"12-slide proposal deck covering: title slide, company overview, challenge statement, solution overview, 3 solution pillars (1 slide each), implementation timeline, ROI summary, team and support, next steps, appendix.","talkTrackDraft":"Section-by-section speaking notes with transition phrases, key emphasis points, and objection-handling cues. Covers opening hook, pain point validation, solution walkthrough, ROI presentation, and closing ask.","faqDraft":"15-question FAQ document covering: pricing structure, implementation timeline, integration requirements, SOC 2 compliance, data security, customization options, training and onboarding, API access, scalability, support SLA, contract terms, pilot scope, success metrics, competitive differentiation, and enterprise expansion path."}
